title: A Movie About Wrestling Becomes a Stage Show
summary: A movie called Fighting With My Family, which is about a real-life wrestler named Paige, is being turned into a musical play. The movie tells the story of Paige, who comes from a family of wrestlers in Britain and works hard to join WWE in America. Dwayne Johnson, a famous actor and wrestler, helped make the movie and is now helping with the musical. The musical is being created by a company called Tilted Musicals, and they want it to be fun for everyone, not just wrestling fans. They say wrestling is like a play because it has heroes and villains and tells stories. The musical will have songs written by Miranda Cooper and Nick Coler, who have written music for popular singers. The story is about family, love, and following your dreams.

background_read: This article is about a movie based on a true story of a wrestler named Paige, who grew up in a wrestling family in Britain and worked hard to join WWE in America. The movie is now being made into a musical play, which is a type of show with singing and dancing. Dwayne Johnson, a well-known actor and wrestler, is involved in both the movie and the musical. The creators want the musical to appeal to many people, not just those who like wrestling, because they think wrestling is like a play with stories and characters. The musical will have new songs written by music experts.
Article_Structure: WHO: The article is about Dwayne Johnson, Paige (a wrestler), and the production company Tilted Musicals.
WHAT: A movie called Fighting With My Family is being adapted into a stage musical.
WHERE: The story starts in Britain and moves to America for WWE.
WHY: To tell a story about family and wrestling in a fun musical way for everyone to enjoy.

perspectives.description: The musical is a new way to enjoy a popular movie and wrestling story.
